---
title: 'Dinner Table Church'
date: '2023-07-19T16:09:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1376482394446576457'
blogger_filename: '/2023/07/dinner-table-church.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Ministry'
---

<br />Note to self: Sharing. I listened to that message reluctantly. I am still internally resisting "ministry", more than I realized. Probably a trauma response. But when I stop, get still, get quiet, I know that some form of "ministry" will always be calling. I also had a realization. My Jen and I are uniquely gifted for this kind of ministry. Not the Sunday morning, plastic smiles, concert followed by a public speaker ministry. But, the kind where it all happens around a fire pit and/or a dinner table. Jen, Larry, and a few others have shown me the power of the Dinner Table as where "real" church happens. What might it look like to switch gears and proactively begin inviting people to the table at the Wolfe-Nelson family ranch? What might regular or semi-regular gatherings look like? Could we take what the one CDA family does with Monday Night Dinners, but make it our own? I'm not sure exactly what this next season holds, but, I think it falls within range of this vision, somewhere.<br /><br /><a href="https://pca.st/episode/eb51d77e-1acb-4bd1-8f73-232cfde98845" target="_blank">Bringing the Church to Work. At Disney World. with Steven Barr</a><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjE3QfIGvl-iMggm4hyWyrVMzeInaGaocMkC-L1866rXxR7N1gkHZ1TASM0s7G-wu0E342QvHVkUTSQcLJLjsI-qBttSJP0TU8cdBeFI5qQhisiyTTZL4yee2jl5lYZqbu0LN-CBSlKff9Hhm2qxu0Xse_qAmij5dUQhGplEZFR6wQPDgWHHaSLB8f3Zqw" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="" data-original-height="902" data-original-width="636" height="240" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjE3QfIGvl-iMggm4hyWyrVMzeInaGaocMkC-L1866rXxR7N1gkHZ1TASM0s7G-wu0E342QvHVkUTSQcLJLjsI-qBttSJP0TU8cdBeFI5qQhisiyTTZL4yee2jl5lYZqbu0LN-CBSlKff9Hhm2qxu0Xse_qAmij5dUQhGplEZFR6wQPDgWHHaSLB8f3Zqw" width="169" /></a></div><br /><br /><br /><br />
